assertion_results.text: An index.html file is produced and renders without errors
Each input has a visible label positioned above (or clearly beside) it; no placeholder-only fields and no floating/morphing labels
Inputs have a visible focus state (focus ring or border change)
Buttons use solid/outline fills, not gradient backgrounds, and are not full-width pills
assertion_results.evidence: rounded-full uses: 0 (manual: confirm these are avatars/toggles, not buttons/cards)

assertion_results.text: No CSS gradient used as a background anywhere on the page
The primary/accent color is neutral or a single restrained hue (not blue/indigo/cyan)
assertion_results.evidence: no obvious blue/indigo/cyan accent utilities (heuristic — confirm visually)

assertion_results.text: Body font is Geist or a system stack, not Inter/Roboto/Segoe UI
assertion_results.evidence: no banned font; (Geist not explicitly found — verify system stack)

assertion_results.text: No decorative mini-notes or eyebrow labels explaining what each section does
